description: A conceptual design team is performing a configuration trade study comparing the baseline low-wing eCRM-001 transport aircraft against a high-wing variant. Open the baseline model located at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3 in OpenVSP. Following the specification document on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/highwing_spec.txt), convert the model into a high-wing configuration by: 1) Moving the Wing component's Z-Location upwards so it sits on top of the fuselage (approx +2.0 to +3.5 m), and 2) Reducing the outboard dihedral to a value between -3.0 and +2.0 degrees, as high-wing aircraft require less geometric dihedral. Save the modified model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_highwing.vsp3 using File > Save As. Do not modify the wingspan, sweep, or chords.
